subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face toward the Dawning-Place of the Cause! Hearken unto the call of the Wronged One from the precincts of the Prison. Verily, there is no God but [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المقبل الی مطلع الامر اسمع ندآء المظلوم من شطر السجن انه ما من اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
